[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011101 4
1 01111000 4
2 11011110 6
3 00111111 6
4 01111101 6
5 11111111 a
6 10101111 6
7 01111111 7
